Description.Name: Time Manager
Description.Details:
You became a commander after years as a [[DM.BaseDescriptionDefs[Pafftek_Lore_TimeManager],consultant Time Manager]]. 
 Because of your abilities with time management you can predict when things can happen to a limited extent.

 [[DM.BaseDescriptionDefs[Pafftek_Lore_SpecialDrop],Has special drop ability]]

OptionDescription: You became a commander after years as a consultant Time Manager.
Intro: You became a commander after years as a consultant Time Manager.
BioDescription: You became a commander after years as consultant Time Manager.
